unit.name: WP_Http request proxy option decision
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http.php with WP_HTTP_Proxy, WP_HTTP_Requests_Hooks, WP_HTTP_Requests_Response, WP_HTTP_Response, and WP_Http_Cookie support
unit.public_contract: This candidate promotes only the WP_Http::request decision that a Requests proxy option is attached when WP_HTTP_Proxy is enabled and send_through_proxy returns true. PHP still owns public request ABI, WP_HTTP_Proxy policy and filters, proxy constants, host/bypass matching, authentication handoff, native WpOrg Requests Proxy Http object construction, Requests dispatch, debug/error handling, and native arrays/objects.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass request proxy option, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded network/proxy parity gates before claiming public PHP ownership.
